## 📋 Pull Request Type

- [ ] 🆕 Adding a new MCP server
- [ ] 📝 Updating an existing server
- [ ] 🐛 Fixing a bug
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Other (please describe)

## For New Server Submissions

### ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have created a new YAML file in the `servers/` directory
- [ ] The filename uses lowercase and hyphens (e.g., `my-server-mcp.yaml`)
- [ ] I have followed the YAML format in the README
- [ ] I have run the validation script locally: `python scripts/validate.py servers/my-server.yaml`
- [ ] The server is a REMOTE MCP server (not a local server)
- [ ] I have tested the server and confirm it works
- [ ] The endpoint URL is accessible
- [ ] I am the maintainer or have permission to submit this server

### 📝 Server Details
**Server Name:** 
**Category:** 
**Endpoint:** 
**Authentication Type:** 

### 🔗 Links
- **Server Documentation:** 
- **Live Server URL:**

<!-- Describe what you're changing and why -->
